top_patterns.description: Starts with a personal reflection or emotional statement, often expressing gratitude or awe.
example_quotes: My god daughter luisa says "uncle Blake, what beautiful mountains". I have to agree.  Wow!!!
Good truth as I start writing out my new year goals for 2016.  This is going to be a really big year...

top_patterns.description: Describes an activity or experience with enthusiasm, often including gratitude or acknowledgment.
example_quotes:
Drop the driver......
Biodegradable golf balls and the most memorable drive ever....long and straight!
Make my the summit after 6 hours felt so good above queenstown yesterday.

top_patterns.description: Shares a personal or family moment, often with a sense of pride or love.
example_quotes: My favorite moment of the day was when summit told me "this was the best year of his life". Happy 1st birthday my sweet son
My god daughter luisa says "uncle Blake, what beautiful mountains". I have to agree.  Wow!!!

top_patterns.description: Encourages support or awareness for a cause, often with a link or hashtag.
example_quotes: Help us celebrate Summit’s first birthday by giving the gift of clean water to others that don’t readily have access to it.
Supporting homeless & disabled artists. This original piece was the perfect Holiday gift for a special family member!

archetypal_structures.formula: Expresses gratitude or reflection + personal insight
example_quotes: Thanks @jimmy_chin for this wonderful image to start thanksgiving day.  Yes, we all have so much to be thankful for.
This is going to be a really big year, and the beginning of many great things.

archetypal_structures.formula: Describes an activity or achievement + acknowledgment
example_quotes: Make my the summit after 6 hours felt so good above queenstown yesterday.
Greates powder week of my life. Thank you CMH!

archetypal_structures.formula: Share a personal or family moment + emotional reflection
example_quotes: My favorite moment of the day was when summit told me "this was the best year of his life".
Summit's first kiss, what precision and love how he looks up to make sure we were watching his delivery after he plants one on her :)

archetypal_structures.formula: Call to support or promote a cause + link/hashtag
example_quotes: Let’s live ‘for one another’ and incorporate giving into everything we do.
Supporting homeless & disabled artists. This original piece was the perfect Holiday gift for a special family member!

language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences, often 8-15 words
language_habits.line_break_style: Frequent line breaks for emphasis, often after key phrases

example_quotes: Thanks @jimmy_chin for this wonderful image to start thanksgiving day.
This is going to be a really big year...
Make my the summit after 6 hours felt so good above queenstown yesterday.
Greates powder week of my life. Thank you CMH!
My favorite moment of the day was when summit told me "this was the best year of his life".
My god daughter luisa says "uncle Blake, what beautiful mountains".

anti_patterns: Excessive hashtags or links in captions
Overly promotional language without personal touch

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's captions are highly personal, reflective, and experience-driven, emphasizing authenticity and connection.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Recent captions show more focus on family moments and cause-driven messages, less on generic motivational quotes.
